---
title: "Cats"
page-layout: full
repo-actions: false
lightbox:
  match: auto
  loop: true
---

Penelope, Peanut, Kingsley, Princeton, Patches, Petunia, Georgie, Sweetheart, Mango, Sherlock

:::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
![Penelope, Peanut](https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/penelope-peanut-pad.jpg){group="cats"}

![Peanut](https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/peanut-veranda.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley](https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/kingsley-veranda.jpg){group="cats"}

<!--
![Patches](){group="cats"}
-->
:::

::: {.g-col-8}
![Penelope, Peanut](https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/peanut-penelope-piano.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley](https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/kingsley-veranda-leg.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley](https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/kingsley-counter.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley & Princeton](https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/com.andrewzah.images/cats/kingsley-princeton-veranda-table.jpg){group="cats"}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
:::
::::
